title: 桜花賞の後に・樫の楯へと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet comes within a hair's breadth of
winning the Oka Sho but falls at the final hurdle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swears to regain her honor at the next Tiara
race, the Japanese Oaks, and that she won't let
anybody else take the title of Queen of the Oaks.
